column1: # This file allows you to customize how ZAP treats specific findings:
# - WARN: Report as warning (doesn't fail the build)
# - FAIL: Report and fail the build
# Cloudflare or CDN related (often false positives)
# Spectre vulnerability - not applicable for API backends (no browser-rendered content)
# Default: All alerts are treated as WARN (won't fail the build but will be reported)
